{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304363674FA20ADDB4706EDEFA4"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619630339637805849","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，比9成9的直播鉴宝文都要好，日常捡漏+直播互补，而不是每天都在直播间咋咋呼呼。
但是有建议：造价方面不要天天都是树脂方面，可以整一点比较精彩一点的瓷器/书画/钱币/精品高仿，国外名画等精彩一点点剧情。
如果后面还是树脂塑料，掉漆染色之类套路，难免会疲劳。
甚至可以往内藏间谍机密文件走，傍上点顶级大佬背书。
或者甚至是明星来直播间鉴宝/下乡寻宝/古宅清宝/长辈去世儿孙卖田/甚至写到后面，可以去国外扫货，让宝物回国这些剧情。
而且有你这个无敌的鉴定效果：甚至真的整点神异的玩意，强身健体的宝物，往唯我独法那个方向走一走。或者真的什么古代的神仙吐纳法。让主播不管是面对古玩市场/古玩黑市/乡下探宝，有反抗的手段。
免得涉及那种马上要产生冲突了，刚好有人来出手救援的《及时雨》剧情。
你前面一些剧情设置就很干净利落。比那些探宝文好在的地方就是不在家长里短拉扯，很多地方迅速破冰打假。
《爽,不憋屈》就很好","text_exts":[{"e":13,"s":9,"text":"直播鉴宝","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9B%B4%E6%92%AD%E9%89%B4%E5%AE%9D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421179606EDEFA4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227619630339637805849%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227601912212432636952%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9B%B4%E6%92%AD%E9%89%B4%E5%AE%9D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774086611,"group_id":"7601912212432636952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw+UK/0Qf+jLPT7DnrQIC62/VTa43XG0B1fJvzT30JPq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7fe645b2e3e14500b1b5abbb21e3a275~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795281&x-signature=TnwqFKtwlRLxM5V8CXqyMq7qmOg%3D","user_id":"2346835594973572","user_name":"律政先锋·张大炮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2346835594973572","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601912212432636952","book_info":{"abstract":"【直播、鉴宝、系统、打脸、搞笑】
老妈花三万八买了个“大明宣德炉”当传家宝，我一眼看去，系统疯狂报警！
【风险提示：表面涂层含高浓度醋酸铅，加热可致幻，长期接触致癌！】
这哪是古董？这分明是通往极乐世界的单程车票！
为了追回老妈的养老钱，我反手连麦那个所谓的“鉴宝大师”。
大师：“这是岁月的包浆，闻着有宝气！”
我：“宝气？大师，那是一级致癌物挥发的味道！您这炉子再烧一会，全村都能吃席了！”
大师：“胡说八道！这是精炼铜！”
我掏出打火机当场点火，铜炉瞬间化成一滩黑水，毒烟滚滚！
全网观众炸了：“卧槽！主播你鉴的不是宝，是命啊！”
从此，鉴宝界出了个泥石流。
别人鉴宝看真假，路钧鉴宝看刑期！
“美女，这玉镯别戴了，强酸洗过的，戴久了截肢！”
“老板，这夜明珠挺亮啊，辐射超标两万倍，您没觉得最近头发掉光了吗？”
骗子主播瑟瑟发抖，刑警队长连夜关注。
路钧：“别跑啊家人们，我还没给你们科普这‘鹤顶红’的口感呢！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7098bb82fd8bdc490e5c57a3226cb0b2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"惊起一堂春","author_id":"","book_id":"7601912212432636952","book_name":"直播鉴宝，我一眼定真","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601912268548211224","read_count":"11762","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"163817"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"64","tags":"都市日常,都市,无女主,直播,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7098bb82fd8bdc490e5c57a3226cb0b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395796&x-signature=g8RZT38GbfA8gzIv3LHa%2FKh5PzA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3692620699938556","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304363674FA20ADDB4706EDEFA4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6622,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1},"user_action":{"
